TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Wanrong (Banrong go, 萬榮鄉) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 687.39 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 627 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 49.32 km²), 5,610 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,807 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,400 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 96%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Truku, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Wanrong ays psgayun 6 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Ihownang , Murisaka , Maribasi , Matanki , Donkuan , Kunuan , Damayan , Thgahan , Ciyakang , Gbayang .
S.PHON: wanroŋ (βanroŋ ɣo, ***) mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na truku, βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu wanroŋ ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, iħownaŋ , muris~ɕaka , mariβas~ɕi , matanki , *onkuan , kunuan , *amajan , tħɣaħan , ʦ~ʨijakaŋ , ɣβajaŋ .
S.FORM: Wanrong (Banrong go, 萬榮鄉) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 687.39 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 627 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 49.32 km²), 5,610 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,807 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,400 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 96%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Truku, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Wanrong ays psgayun 6 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Ihownang , Murisaka , Maribasi , Matanki , Donkuan , Kunuan , Damayan , Thgahan , Ciyakang , Gbayang .
S.PHON: wanroŋ (βanroŋ ɣo, ***) mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na truku, βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu wanroŋ ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, iħownaŋ , muris~ɕaka , mariβas~ɕi , matanki , *onkuan , kunuan , *amajan , tħɣaħan , ʦ~ʨijakaŋ , ɣβajaŋ .
